creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
HP EliteBook 8570p with integral Chicony HP HD webcam. 

virtualbox-ose 5.2.34_1 on FreeBSD-CURRENT r359750. 

Guest environment: 

* Windows 10 build 1909
* Sonix driver 6.0.1114.19 for the webcam

– presumably this driver: 

<https://www.catalog.update.microsoft.com/ScopedViewInline.aspx?updateid=4442d448-1213-4fb4-8d71-c5ffb34331ae>

If the Chicony webcam is enabled in the guest, and if (for example) I attempt to use some features of Microsoft Teams, then the guest seems prone to crashing.
